name: Block3_PushPop
comment: Stack ops on register pairs: PUSH rr (0xC5/D5/E5/F5) and POP rr (0xC1/D1/E1/F1). qq selects BC/DE/HL/AF. POP AF must mask the low nibble of F to 0 since those bits are unused/zero on LR35902.

formats.name: Push_Rr
formats.comment: 11_qq0_101 — PUSH (decrement SP twice, store high then low byte).

formats.name: Pop_Rr
formats.comment: 11_qq0_001 — POP (load low then high; SP += 2). qq=11 → AF, low nibble of F masked to 0.
